summary: Test suite provides solid unit-level coverage of the New-BuildMatrix library function and workflow file structure checks, but has critical gaps: (1) No tests of the Invoke-MatrixGenerator.ps1 CLI entry point—file I/O, JSON parsing, error paths are untested; (2) JSON output format is never validated; (3) No error scenario testing despite task requirement to 'handle errors gracefully with meaningful error messages'; (4) ConvertTo-Hashtable function uncovered; (5) Workflow structure tests rely on brittle regex matching instead of YAML parsing; (6) Test fixtures referenced but not used in Pester tests. Happy-path coverage of core matrix generation is reasonable, but edge cases (empty arrays, null values, type mismatches, negative/zero parameters) and boundary conditions are largely missing. The task explicitly requires 'output the complete matrix JSON' and testing must cover the full pipeline, not just library internals—this is not addressed. The test suite would benefit from integration tests of the CLI with real config files and validation of produced JSON against GitHub Actions schema.
